description: Finalny snapshot POC Twenty CRM — schema, workflows, dane, adaptery, eventy.

active.name: deal · zmiana etapu · event do orkiestracji
active.trigger: Record Updated on Opportunity — field: Stage
steps: 1. Code (Logic Function): fetch latest Opportunity via GraphQL API (filter: updatedAt ≥ 3s ago + stage in [QUALIFIED, WON, LOST]). Build EVENT_CONTRACT payload. Return payloadJson, idEvent, now.
2. HTTP Request: POST payloadJson to webhook.site (POC) / Stape endpoint (prod).
3. Update Record: set lastOrchestrationEventAt = now, lastOrchestrationEventId = idEvent.

active.name: deal · campaign rejected · event do orkiestracji
active.trigger: Record Updated on Opportunity — field: campaignRejected
steps: 1. Code (Logic Function): fetch latest Opportunity via GraphQL API (filter: updatedAt ≥ 3s ago + campaignRejected = true). Build lead_rejected payload. Return payloadJson, idEvent, now.
2. HTTP Request: POST payloadJson to webhook.site (POC) / Stape endpoint (prod).

completedTasks: Schema: 6 stages, ~11 custom fields na Opportunity
Import: 56 Opportunities + 59 Companies + 25 People z Supabase
Outbound: 4 eventy (qualify_lead, lead_won, lead_lost, lead_rejected) verified on webhook.site
Inbound: adapter spec + test script verified (Person + Opportunity + Note via API)
pendingForProduction: Zmiana webhook.site → Stape endpoint w workflow Code step
knownLimitations: Code step params nie mapuje trigger data — workaround: embedded GraphQL API call wewnątrz Code
Race condition: jeśli 2 Opportunities zmienią stage w <3s, Code może pobrać niewłaściwy rekord
idOid nie istnieje na Person — tylko na Opportunity (EVENT_CONTRACT mówi o Person.idOid ale schema Twenty tego nie wspiera)
